'''Ar'wa Nonshik''' was a male [[Aramandi]] who worked for the [[Antar Band]], a criminal organization active in the space around the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. Nonshik was a bodyguard until his employer was killed by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Ujin Voli]]. Voli was impressed by Nonshik and offered him a job. Nonshik accepted the offer and began working as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] for the Antar Band.

{{Char-stub}}
